stories.headline: Killing of Iranian activist in Canada exposes divisions in diaspora
stories.description: Activist's killing in Canada exposes divisions in the Iranian diaspora.

stories.headline: Surrey Police investigating Epsom rape issue disorder warning
stories.description: Riot police are deployed in Epsom after protesters gathered to demand descriptions of the suspects.

stories.headline: Why are fuel price protests sweeping the Republic of Ireland?
stories.description: Demonstrations led by convoys of trucks blocking roads and crucial infrastructure may move north of the border.

stories.headline: Satellite images reveal scale of Israeli demolitions as Lebanese villages destroyed
stories.description: BBC Verify analysis found more than 1,400 buildings had been destroyed since 2 March.

stories.headline: South African politician Julius Malema sentenced to prison for firing gun
stories.description: Magistrate hands the opposition figure five-year term, that his lawyers say will be appealed.
